SPRING BREEZES ARE GALES IN A CITY OF SKYSCRAPERS; Between the Park and the Battery Are Many Spots Where the Winds Make Trouble for the Pedestrian -- Real Danger at Crossings.
Sp art by F Austin, Spring Breezes Are Gales in a City of Skyscrapers

PLEA OF AUSTRIA ROUSES NEIGHBORS; Vienna Explains Request for League Economic Inquiry Is Not Aimed at Them. NO CONFERENCE YET SOUGHT Split Over Question of Union With Germany -- Seipel Disavows Move by Party Leaders.
Neighbors roused by appeal

HOPE REACTION IN VIENNA NEARS END; Real Shareholders Unwilling to Sell at Present Prices; Trading at Standstill. COMPANY DIVIDENDS GOOD Economic Situation of Austria Declared Now to Be Improving Visibly -- Reduction in Unemployed.
